name: Prophecy Countdown
overview: Prophecy Countdown is an epic, 15-part Bible study experience presented by Doug Batchelor, president of Amazing Facts International. It is designed to help you explore the pages of God’s Word and get clear, trustworthy, logical answers to your most pressing questions about the book of Revelation, prophecy, and the last days. It also offers a look at what the future will soon bring upon this planet and the practical tools you'll need to thrive in the days ahead!

trailers.title: Prophecy Countdown: What's Next? Doug Batchelor (Amazing Facts)
